Patch Set 1:

Does this docker work?  data-router was broken (see AAI-2825, wondering if the same issue is here?)  I tried to build and docker per the README.md, but it doesn't work

Meanwhile this submission related to changes are also being rebuilt by us for any issues though in the pre-submission phase the local setup was working fine.

Will provide an update soon.

There isnt any issue in this microservice as it is not using aai-common artifact.
